scenario: Partial availability — can cover 2 of 3 trucks requested
subject: RE: Portland to Sacramento Flatbeds
body:
Jillian,

We can cover 2 of the 3 flatbeds for the Portland-Sacramento lumber move.

Rate: $1,950 per truck (all-in, includes tarps)
Available trucks: 2
Pickup: Can do April 22 or 23
Delivery: April 26 (1 day earlier than requested)

We don't have a third truck available that week unfortunately. Want us to book the 2 we have while you find coverage for the third?

Cascade Trucking
Ops Desk
(503) 555-0714

expected_bid.terms: $1,950/truck all-in, includes tarps. Can only cover 2 of 3 trucks.
